markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.319 — Defense Superior Service Medal Recipients

The department shall issue specialty license plates for recipients of the Defense Superior Service Medal. License plates issued under this section must include the words “Defense Superior Service Medal” at the bottom of each plate.

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 432 (S.B.563), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2013.*
